hints: Start by writing a contains() helper that checks if a character exists in a string
Use contains() to build isAlpha() — check each character against the alphabet
Use the same pattern for isNumeric() — check each character against "0123456789"
For isAlphanumeric(), use isAlpha() and isNumeric() together with continue to skip valid characters
In whatAmI(), call all three helpers and use conditionals to return the right label
